nasb.text: (For many nations and great kings will make slaves of them, even them; and I will recompense them according to their deeds and according to the work of their hands.)’ ”

esv.text: For many nations and great kings shall make slaves even of them, and I will recompense them according to their deeds and the work of their hands.”

cnv.text: 因為許多國家和大君王將要奴役迦勒底人，我必按著他們的作為和他們手所作的報應他們。”

ccb.text: 他们必受许多国家和强大君王的奴役，我要按他们的所作所为报应他们。”
